title: DoorDash Stock Forecast & Analyst Price Targets
text: StockAnalysis provides comprehensive forecasting data for DoorDash, tracking analyst price targets, earnings estimates, and forward guidance. The consensus analyst rating is buy with price targets ranging significantly, indicating mixed investor sentiment regarding valuation. Earnings per share projections show continued growth, with analyst consensus expecting strong profitability expansion as the company scales higher-margin business segments. Revenue forecasts indicate healthy growth rates, though some caution exists regarding sustaining mid-20s order growth rates as DoorDash matures. Stock forecasts range widely based on different scenarios for profitability improvement, international expansion success, and competitive dynamics. The analytical consensus suggests DoorDash remains in an inflection point where execution on profitability while maintaining growth will be critical to valuation justification.
